# PromptArc

PromptArc is a bilingual AI image prompt gallery and prompt-to-image workflow site with three primary surfaces: home, gallery, and generate.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.promptarc.cc/): Main landing page and product entry.
- [Gallery](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/): Full prompt gallery with in-page category filters and preview modals.
- [Generate](https://www.promptarc.cc/generate/): Prompt-to-image generation workspace.
- [Chinese Home](https://www.promptarc.cc/zh/): Chinese landing page.
- [Chinese Gallery](https://www.promptarc.cc/zh/gallery/): Chinese gallery surface.
- [Chinese Generate](https://www.promptarc.cc/zh/generate/): Chinese generation workspace.

## What The Site Provides

- Original AI image prompt examples paired with generated images.
- In-page prompt previews instead of separate prompt detail pages.
- English prompts with bilingual page wrappers and filters.
- A safe prompt-to-image workspace that is designed to call image APIs through a private backend rather than exposing API keys in the browser.

## Technical Discovery

- Sitemap: https://www.promptarc.cc/sitemap.xml
- Image sitemap: https://www.promptarc.cc/image-sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.promptarc.cc/robots.txt
